title: eberlanzia puniens
side_effects: Eberlanzia puniens can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory issues. Some individuals may also experience headaches, dizziness, and nausea after ingesting the plant's toxins. Furthermore, prolonged exposure to the plant's compounds can cause long-term health issues, including hormonal imbalances and cardiovascular problems.
